findings: The GB200 NVL72 connects 36 Grace CPUs and 72 Blackwell GPUs in a rack-scale, liquid-cooled design forming a 72-GPU NVLink domain that acts as a single, massive GPU and delivers 30x faster real-time trillion-parameter LLM inference with 10x greater MoE performance.
The GB200 NVL72 rack-level NVLink domain provides 130 TB/s of total NVLink bandwidth, with each GPU contributing 3.6 TB/s of NVLink bandwidth per rack-level specification.

The GB200 NVL72 uses fifth-generation NVLink technology with 1.8 TB/s GPU-to-GPU interconnect per GPU and 130 TB/s aggregate rack-level bandwidth, delivered via NVLink Switch Trays with 144 NVLink ports per tray.
The GB200 NVL72 rack contains 10 compute trays and 9 NVLink Switch Trays that provide the all-to-all GPU-to-GPU interconnect fabric within the rack.

The GB200 NVL72 uses NVLink to interconnect all nodes within the rack, delivering the performance of 'one big GPU' with exceptional interconnect bandwidth and energy efficiency for AI and HPC workloads.
